text.title: Hacker News Launch Strategy Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Hacker News Launch Strategy.

example.scenario: Solo dev shipping an open-source CLI tool.
example.trace: 4 weeks of HN comments → karma 78 → title 'Show HN: faion — Methodology base for AI coding agents' → Tue 8:30 AM ET → 48h engagement → 187 points, 64 comments, all answered
